{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023141E0EC8851EF22BB702C46"}"},"total":243},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7444168797731849022","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊啊啊，好看爱看，多来点，才看到28章就嘴角都咧到太阳系了，好甜，好好看(｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡。直球周用行动和言语打败别扭西弗成功恋爱，救命🆘里面的语言逻辑简直就是精华，一个ooc分都没有！！！那些话感觉就像他们嘴里说出来的一样！我真的超爱！！！！大大多来点！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733234973,"group_id":"7425538637741182014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"同人爱好者（各种同人）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/S+MHT7U6T7ISKaMNsgSGG95H4OuFC/Yr/MfW6fN76z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a763f8918dff4042a11cbd87f07ac504~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708143&x-signature=71Errda38mupIzhDLtqqsj1A1Ew%3D","user_id":"3395765776948589","user_name":"然然RNA"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3395765776948589","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664154020,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425538637741182014","book_info":{"abstract":"【初始书名为《灵魂欢愉》】
双男主，原创攻X西弗勒斯•斯内普，本文视角为 主攻。
谈恋爱小甜饼，初衷就是斯教生日贺文，没什么大主线，就是日常恩恩爱爱四个孤儿凑一家过日子。
——
和提奥结婚后，西弗勒斯的生活发生了如下改变：
成了哈利·波特的养父；
从蜘蛛尾巷搬到了伦敦郊区；
小天狼星搬过来成了邻居；
魔药论文一年八刊，八投八中梅林勋章；
移居华国并主持多个科研所研究项目；
彻底没有空闲时间了，甚至连魔药时间都搭出去一大半，因为某龙不肯做人；
……
——
排雷：私设如山，主角东方龙，修士；
男主在斯教面前时，表现为贱嗖嗖的人间油物，榨油率高达120%，斯教还倒欠他二两油。
不黑邓多多但是有写到他很防备男主（个人认为合理，最后放下了戒备）；
最后主角拐带斯教和哈利赫敏罗恩一起回国建设祖国的魔法学校了。
男主不是好东西，骨子里沁坏水，坑蒙拐骗乃至强制都有，他只是自愿接受规则约束，接受祖国的要求，“像”个正直的人那样活着，不要对他有道德期待。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/552912f475f776cc304018c5c7394632","author":"猫醋王","author_id":"","book_id":"7425538637741182014","book_name":"和我结婚后，西弗收养了哈利","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3971人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425538734482801214","read_count":"3971","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"881245"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"281","tags":"双男主,校园,甜宠,同人,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eed18bc21b88df554139a4345205a87b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301901&x-signature=flNirzkpSLPkW8mdKs0uKCtH6TA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109496646060","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023141E0EC8851EF22BB702C46"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10429,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3592},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1733239057,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522630952365687577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，第一章就被狠狠吸引住了，作者写的那种教授相隔多年再次见到条的微妙感（他们之间肯定发生过什么），让人炒鸡激动有木有（太好磕了这地方）。
提奥对教授的情绪非常敏感，总是能及时发现教授的情绪并干脆利落地解决。喜欢他们各种亲密的称呼和亲亲，以及他们之间的友爱互动，是黏黏糊糊的小情侣😘。
作者大大写的超棒，祝他们越来越幸福！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751508686,"group_id":"7425538637741182014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"平平无奇的看书人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1UcabZsVa5+ZqvvJc1W55u6SzDirxVhCYZnL134FjHC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e7cebb023824486b8d40a200135ddf34~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710670&x-signature=paa8d4rQZybeLDfg0C0i%2FnmehIY%3D","user_id":"3580486993580768","user_name":"ArrogantC."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3580486993580768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425538637741182014","book_info":{"abstract":"【初始书名为《灵魂欢愉》】

排雷：私设如山，主角东方龙，修士；

最后主角拐带斯教和哈利赫敏罗恩一起回国建设祖国的魔法学校了。
男主不是好东西，骨子里沁坏水，坑蒙拐骗乃至强制都有，他只是自愿接受规则约束，接受祖国的要求，“像”个正直的人那样活着，不要对他有道德期待。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/552912f475f776cc304018c5c7394632","author":"猫醋王","author_id":"","book_id":"7425538637741182014","book_name":"和我结婚后，西弗收养了哈利","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3971人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425538734482801214","read_count":"3971","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"881245"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"281","tags":"双男主,校园,甜宠,同人,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eed18bc21b88df554139a4345205a87b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301901&x-signature=flNirzkpSLPkW8mdKs0uKCtH6TA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109496646060","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1697"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023141E0EC8851EF22BB702C46"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读98小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":353229,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1540},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1751509335,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529528768022348568","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"噫呜呜噫～不愧是我左等右蹲眼巴巴数着日子完结的文文，果然不负期待啊～
主线是龙龙成年后追媳妇，充分展现了什么叫做追媳妇应有的态度！直球龙龙yyds！小哈和老邓死伏都只是顺带啦～前传线依旧，温水煮斯斯的阴险龙，if学长线中阳光快乐大粉龙，if竹马线中绿茶爱娇人夫龙…但不管是哪条线都好好好好磕哦～～～
感情线直接磕晕，其他线也不逞多让，爱国情这点真的哈特软软，没毛病，七八十年代，怎么会有人有能力却不为国家建设而努力呢？！大大的背景设定完全冇得问题！超级符合逻辑！非常契合实际！真的很有一种代入感哎～尤其是最后面特别细致的写出了华夏地界的魔法学校的各种细节，啊～今晚的做梦素材有了～真的爱爆！
还有就是其中各种闪耀的女性角色，呜呜呜，真的爱死大大赋予她们的灵魂了，逐渐走向更光明更璀璨的舞台展现自己，而不是一毕业就转职投入家庭，真的好绝好绝～超棒的嘞！！！
呜～感情线疯狂磕磕，爱国情女孩们的觉醒等等都猴猴看～强烈推推推啊啊啊！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753107627,"group_id":"7425538637741182014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这是一枚斯教（偶尔爬墙）的毒唯（*/∇＼*）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93vpPOQKP3tFkZkvX4Z5hdjKolUq4KPa3xpJ58mYzfw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/494e1358a5914e44a9a08677804e72be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703474&x-signature=l58571WaiKUjxkMfdHDJddiDVfo%3D","user_id":"1706032008018151","user_name":"西弗我媳妇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1706032008018151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425538637741182014","book_info":{"abstract":"【初始书名为《灵魂欢愉》】
